name: sentry
title: Sentry error tracking

files.reason: Sentry options factory for wrapping a Worker with withSentry

warnings: Requires the nodejs_compat flag (added to wrangler.jsonc by this add-on).
nextActions: Wrap your worker entry: export default Sentry.withSentry(sentryOptions, handler)
doc:
# Flarecel catalog: Sentry (Cloudflare Workers)

Uses `@sentry/cloudflare`. Sentry's Workers SDK requires the `nodejs_compat` flag (this add-on adds it). Wrap your worker's exported handler with `Sentry.withSentry(sentryOptions(env), handler)`. For Next.js on Cloudflare, follow Sentry's Next.js-on-Cloudflare guide for the build-time wiring.

Verified against Sentry's official Cloudflare platform docs.
